name: ZIP Code Validation Rejects Leading Zeros
description: Enter a valid New England ZIP code (e.g., 01234) during checkout. The validation regex strips the leading zero, then rejects it as too short.

steps.name: Add item to cart
steps.nova_act_prompt: Go to 'USB-C Charging Cable' product and click 'Add to Cart'

steps.name: Proceed to checkout
steps.nova_act_prompt: Open cart and click 'Proceed to Checkout'

steps.name: Fill shipping with leading-zero ZIP
steps.nova_act_prompt: Fill address: Alice Johnson, 789 Elm St, Springfield, MA 01103
steps.expected: All fields filled, form should be valid

steps.name: Submit shipping form
steps.nova_act_prompt: Click 'Continue' to proceed to shipping method selection

seeded_bugs.name: ZIP validation strips leading zeros
seeded_bugs.description: parseInt(zip) converts '01103' to 1103, then String(1103).length === 4 fails the 5-digit check
